.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Update Apache License URL from HTTP to HTTPS for security compliance.
Reorder import statements to follow standard convention (java.io before java.net).
Reformat string concatenation to place the operator at the end of the line for better readability.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.before:
private static final String DEFAULT_DOWNLOAD_URL = "https://repo.maven.apache.org/maven2/io/takari/maven-wrapper/"
        + WRAPPER_VERSION + "/maven-wrapper-" + WRAPPER_VERSION + ".jar";
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.after:
private static final String DEFAULT_DOWNLOAD_URL =
        "https://repo.maven.apache.org/maven2/io/takari/maven-wrapper/" + WRAPPER_VERSION + "/maven-wrapper-" + WRAPPER_VERSION + ".jar";

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Collapse multi-line string constant assignments into single lines.
Collapse multi-line string constant assignments into single lines.
Add space after 'if' keyword to comply with standard code style.
Add space after 'if' keyword to comply with standard code style.
Add space after 'if' keyword and reformat nested block for consistency.
Reformat anonymous class instantiation to align braces and improve readability.
Remove trailing empty line at the end of the file.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Migrate the import statement from the legacy javax.annotation package to the Jakarta EE namespace jakarta.annotation.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (and thus unavailable in standard Jakarta-based Spring Boot 3/JDK 17+ setups), causing a compile error 'package javax.annotation does not exist'.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the version string in the Generated annotation comment to reflect the current JHipster version.
Replace javax.annotation with jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace changes required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.annotation does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3).

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Adopt Java 17 text blocks for multi-line log messages to improve readability.
Add CRLFLogConverter marker to ensure log messages are safe for CRLF line endings.
Handle empty active profiles by falling back to default profiles in the log message.
Add JHipster generator needle comments to the ApplicationProperties class to allow future code generation hooks.
Add a Spring profile condition to exclude the AsyncConfiguration bean from loading during specific test profiles.
Migrate from legacy Mongock Spring 5 integration to the modern Spring Boot starter annotation.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The old Mongock Spring 5 API classes (MongockSpring5, SpringDataMongo3Driver) are removed or incompatible with the new Mongock Spring Boot starter, causing compilation errors if the old bean definition is kept.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove unused imports and fields related to the removed Mongock bean and logging.
Remove imports for Zalando Problem modules that are no longer used in the configuration class.
Remove the bean definition for the ProblemModule Jackson module.
Remove the bean definition for the ConstraintViolationProblemModule Jackson module.
Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with SecurityFilterChain bean to comply with Spring Security 5.7+ API changes.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7 and removed in Spring Security 6.0; extending it causes compilation errors or severe deprecation warnings in modern Spring Boot 3.x environments.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with @EnableMethodSecurity to align with Spring Security 6.0 method security configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity is removed in Spring Security 6.0; using it results in a compilation error.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Migrate HttpSecurity configuration from fluent API with .and() to lambda-based DSL required by Spring Security 5.7+.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The old fluent API methods like .authorizeRequests() and .headers() without lambdas are removed in Spring Security 6.0; code fails to compile.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace antMatchers with requestMatchers in authorization rules to comply with Spring Security 6.0 API.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: antMatchers is removed in Spring Security 6.0; using it causes a compilation error.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace featurePolicy with permissionsPolicy to align with modern browser standards and Spring Security API updates.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: featurePolicy is deprecated/removed in newer Spring Security versions; the API expects permissionsPolicy.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Switch exception handling from custom SecurityProblemSupport to standard OAuth2 BearerToken handlers.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The previous custom support class is removed or incompatible with the new OAuth2 resource server configuration; standard handlers are required for compilation/runtime correctness in the new stack.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add OAuth2 Resource Server JWT configuration to replace legacy JWT filter setup.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The legacy JWTConfigurer and TokenProvider approach is removed; Spring Security 6 requires explicit oauth2ResourceServer configuration for JWT validation.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove WebSecurity ignore configuration as it is no longer needed or handled differently in the new filter chain.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The configure(WebSecurity web) method is no longer part of the SecurityFilterChain bean pattern; keeping it causes compilation errors or is ignored.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update CSP and frame options to use lambda configuration and dynamic properties.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The old static string-based CSP configuration is replaced by a lambda-based API that supports dynamic property injection.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace CorsFilter with SpaWebFilter for handling SPA routing and CORS.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The legacy CorsFilter injection is removed in favor of a dedicated SpaWebFilter for better SPA support in the new architecture.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove unused imports related to the old security configuration style.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Imports for removed classes (WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter, SecurityProblemSupport, etc.) cause compilation errors if left in the file.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add @Configuration annotation to the security configuration class.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: While not strictly required for the bean to be detected if component-scanned, it is best practice and often required for proper proxying in Spring Security configurations.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update authorization rules to permit access to static assets and Swagger UI explicitly.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The new requestMatchers API requires explicit matching for static resources that were previously ignored or handled differently.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add authorization rule for v3 API docs.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: New endpoint added for OpenAPI 3.0 documentation access control.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Refactor static resource location and path patterns to use file extensions and broader classpath roots.
Update resource path patterns to match specific file extensions instead of directory prefixes.
Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to align with Spring Boot 3.x and Jakarta EE 9+ namespace changes.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are removed in Jakarta EE 9+/Spring Boot 3, causing ClassNotFoundException or compile errors if javax is used.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Use pattern matching for instanceof to simplify casting logic, a feature introduced in Java 16.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Pattern matching for instanceof is not available in Java 11, causing a compile error.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.before:
if (server instanceof ConfigurableServletWebServerFactory) {
            ConfigurableServletWebServerFactory servletWebServer = (ConfigurableServletWebServerFactory) server;

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove try-catch block for UnsupportedEncodingException since StandardCharsets.UTF_8 does not throw this exception.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: While not strictly a compile error in older JDKs, this is a cleanup of legacy code; however, the primary driver is modernizing the API usage. The previous code was valid in J11. This is polishment.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update CORS configuration to include allowedOriginPatterns and update Swagger endpoint paths to match OpenAPI 3.0/Swagger UI 3+ conventions.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: This is a functional update to support newer CORS standards and API documentation tools, not a JDK compatibility requirement.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove unused imports that are no longer needed after code refactoring.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Unused imports are a code smell but do not prevent compilation or runtime execution.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated Mongock v3 annotations with Mongock v4 annotations.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The classes com.github.cloudyrock.mongock.ChangeLog and com.github.cloudyrock.mongock.ChangeSet do not exist in Mongock v4, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated Mongock v3 method annotations with Mongock v4 annotations.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The annotation com.github.cloudyrock.mongock.ChangeSet does not exist in Mongock v4, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated MongockTemplate parameter with Spring Data MongoTemplate.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The class com.github.cloudyrock.mongock.driver.mongodb.springdata.v3.decorator.impl.MongockTemplate does not exist in Mongock v4, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Refactor migration logic to use constructor injection for MongoTemplate.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.after: private final MongoTemplate template; public InitialSetupMigration(MongoTemplate template) { this.template = template; }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Consolidate multiple change sets into a single execution method.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.before: public void addAuthorities(...) { ... } public void addUsers(...) { ... }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add empty rollback method required by Mongock v4.
Extract authority creation logic into helper methods.
Extract user creation logic into helper methods.
